title: tilia mandshurica var. megaphylla
intro: Tilia mandshurica var. megaphylla, also known as the Large-leaved Chinese linden or Large-leaved Tilia, is a deciduous tree or shrub species within the Tilia genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Tilia mandshurica var. megaphylla are said to include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
